name: image-asset-prompt-sidecars
title: Image asset prompt sidecars and inventory
description: Co-locate final image-generation prompts beside project image assets, update global memory/specs, audit existing assets, and reverse-generate missing prompt sidecars for future high-quality replacement.
creator: lijin
notes: P0 task created from explicit user request on 2026-04-30: co-locate final prompts beside image assets, write the rule into global memory/specs, inventory current project images, and reverse-generate prompt sidecars for assets missing original prompts.

meta.user_request: Put final prompts next to corresponding image assets, update global memory, inventory project images, reverse-generate missing prompts, and record as highest-priority Trellis task first.
meta.prompt_sidecar_convention: Same directory as image, preferred filename <image-stem>.prompt.md; reverse-generated prompts must be explicitly labeled reverse-engineered.
meta.priority_reason: P0 because promptless image assets block reliable future high-quality regeneration/replacement and create provenance/IP/style-drift risk.
